name: reva-srujana-shodha
description: TRACK Scholar Plugin: Drives capstone projects, academic manuscript writing, grant proposals, and publication tracking.

copilotAgents.name: reva-scholar
copilotAgents.description: Ask REVA Scholar agent for literature mapping, manuscript review, and grant checks.

slashCommands.name: grant
slashCommands.description: Analyze research draft or topic against active funding brief compliance.

slashCommands.name: manuscript-check
slashCommands.description: Audit research draft for literature integration, hypothesis clarity, structural integrity, and plagiarism risks.

slashCommands.name: proposal-check
slashCommands.description: Audit grant proposal draft for template compliance, novelty strength, budget rationale, and thematic alignment.

slashCommands.name: guide
slashCommands.description: Supervisor dashboard mode: roster review, milestone alerts, and scholar progress updates.
